SEARCH
Module DSA

Package com.dsa.pattern

package com.dsa.pattern
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Backtracking
    Demonstrates the Backtracking Pattern.
    BinarySum
    Demonstrates the Binary Sum Pattern.
    BitManipulation
    Demonstrates the Bit Manipulation Pattern.
    BitmaskDP
    Demonstrates the Bitmask Dynamic Programming (Bitmask DP) Pattern.
    DivideAndConquer
    Demonstrates the Divide and Conquer Pattern.
    DynamicProgramming
    Demonstrates the Dynamic Programming (DP) Pattern.
    FastAndSlowPointer
    Demonstrates the Fast and Slow Pointer Pattern (also called Floyd’s Tortoise and Hare).
    GraphShortestPath
    Demonstrates the Graph Shortest Path Pattern.
    GraphTraversal
    Demonstrates the Graph Traversal Pattern.
    Greedy
    Demonstrates the Greedy Pattern.
    HashingFrequencyCounting
    Demonstrates the Hashing / Frequency Counting Pattern.
    HeapPriorityQueue
    Demonstrates the Heap / Priority Queue Pattern.
    MeetInTheMiddle
    Demonstrates the Meet in the Middle (MITM) Pattern.
    MinimumSpanningTree
    Demonstrates the Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) Pattern.
    MonotonicStack
    Demonstrates the Monotonic Stack Pattern.
    PrefixSum
    Demonstrates the Prefix Sum Pattern.
    PrefixTrie
    Demonstrates the Prefix Trie (or Trie) Pattern.
    Recursion
    Demonstrates the Recursion Pattern.
    SegmentTree
    Demonstrates the Segment Tree Pattern.
    SlidingWindow
    Demonstrates the Sliding Window Pattern.
    TopologicalSort
    Demonstrates the Topological Sort Pattern.
    TreeTraversal
    Demonstrates the Tree Traversal Pattern.
    TwoDGridDP
    Demonstrates the 2D / Grid Dynamic Programming (DP) Pattern.
    TwoPointers
    Demonstrates the Two Pointers Pattern.
    UnionFindDisjointSet
    Demonstrates the Union-Find / Disjoint Set Pattern.
